query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage,
  LEFT(p.overview, 200) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 200) as opportunityNote,
  p.matchedBusinessLines
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
AND (
  p.overview LIKE '%booster%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.overview LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high pressure air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high-pressure air%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline drying%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.overview LIKE '%nitrogen%' OR p.overview LIKE '%FPSO%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%LNG%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil-free%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil free%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dew point%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%booster%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%high pressure%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%nitrogen%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%350 psi%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%500 psi%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dew point%'
)
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage,
  LEFT(p.overview, 200) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 200) as opportunityNote,
  p.matchedBusinessLines
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
AND (
  p.overview LIKE '%booster%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.overview LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high pressure air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high-pressure air%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline drying%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.overview LIKE '%nitrogen%' OR p.overview LIKE '%FPSO%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%LNG%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil-free%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil free%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dew point%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%booster%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%high pressure%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%nitrogen%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%350 psi%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%500 psi%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dew point%'
)
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20;

rows.name: Scarborough Gas Project
rows.owner: Woodside Energy (73.5%), BHP (26.5% - divested to Woodside)
rows.overview: Development of the Scarborough gas field, located approximately 375 km off the coast of north-west Western Australia, to supply gas to the Pluto LNG facility.
rows.opportunityNote: Significant opportunities for maintenance, operational support, and further infrastructure development as the project progresses.

rows.name: Gorgon and Jansz feed gas pipeline system and wells commissioning
rows.overview: Chevron is commissioning the Gorgon and Jansz feed gas pipeline system and wells, with completion expected this year. This involves tie-in supplies for the existing Gorgon LNG project.
rows.opportunityNote: Commissioning activities may require temporary power, dewatering, or specialized portable air for testing/maintenance. Focus on rental opportunities or monitoring for future maintenance contracts.

rows.name: Scarborough Energy Project
rows.overview: The Scarborough Energy Project is on track for its first LNG cargo in Q4. This project involves the development of the Scarborough gas field and associated LNG processing facilities.
rows.opportunityNote: Woodside Energy is the owner of this major gas project. Potential for direct sales of generators, portable air compressors for construction, or pumps. The project is nearing completion with first LNG

rows.name: Origin/APLNG Ironbark Expansion
rows.overview: The Queensland government has approved Origin/APLNG's Ironbark expansion, which includes the drilling of 46 extra gas wells in the Surat Basin. This project is part of the larger APLNG operation.
rows.opportunityNote: 46 new gas wells will require drilling services. Portable air compressors will be needed for drilling operations. Generators for power supply at remote well sites. Pumps for water management during dr

rows.name: Chevron Australia Operations — NWS & Gorgon
rows.stage: Active — 0 open, 92 awarded, 38 closed work packages
rows.overview: Operations and maintenance of Chevron's North West Shelf and Gorgon LNG facilities. Includes subsea, inlet processing, production, utilities, and storage/offloading. Ongoing maintenance and turnaround
rows.opportunityNote: ICN Gateway project with 131 work packages (0 open, 92 awarded). LNG plant turnarounds require fleet-scale compressed air

rows.name: Viva Energy LNG Terminal
rows.overview: Viva Energy's proposed liquefied natural gas (LNG) terminal in Geelong has received federal environmental approval, marking a key milestone for the project.
rows.opportunityNote: Construction of an LNG terminal will require significant civil works. Potential for portable air compressors for various construction tasks, generators for site power, and lighting towers. Dewatering

rows.name: Pluto LNG Flaring Technology Upgrade
rows.overview: Woodside is installing new flaring technology at its Pluto LNG facility. The upgrade is expected to be installed at Pluto 2 later this year. This project aims to improve operational efficiency and pot
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor for potential rental opportunities for temporary power, lighting, or compressed air during installation, commissioning, or maintenance activities at the Pluto LNG facility. The project is an u

rows.name: Gorgon Backfill Fields Development
rows.overview: Chevron plans to drill six new wells to maintain production at the Gorgon LNG facility, safeguarding Australia's energy security.
rows.opportunityNote: Chevron is the owner. Potential for direct sales of drilling compressors, generators, and potentially pumps for dewatering/process needs.

rows.name: Pluto LNG Facility Operations
rows.overview: UGL workers at Woodside's Pluto LNG facility are voting on a pay offer and potential industrial action. The facility is a major LNG production hub.
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor for potential disruptions due to industrial action which may lead to increased demand for rental equipment or temporary power solutions. UGL is a key contractor for follow-up.

rows.name: Ichthys LNG Project Operations
rows.overview: Workers at INPEX's Ichthys LNG Project have voted in favour of strike action, indicating ongoing industrial relations issues. The project is a large-scale LNG production facility.
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor for potential disruptions due to industrial action which may lead to increased demand for rental equipment or temporary power solutions.

rows.name: Browse LNG Project
rows.overview: Woodside expects its Browse LNG project, which would deliver natural gas from the Calliance, Torosa, and Brecknock fields to the existing Karratha gas plant, to cost A$48.7 billion ($35.2 billion).
rows.opportunityNote: Large-scale LNG project with significant CAPEX. Potential for power generation, portable air for construction/maintenance, and pumps. Monitor for FID and contractor awards.

rows.name: SA Water network expansion to Wellington East
rows.overview: Around 220 homes in Wellington East will gain access to safe, treated drinking water as the township’s supply is connected to the wider SA Water network. The upgrade involves expanding the network.
rows.opportunityNote: SA Water is expanding its network to connect Wellington East homes to treated drinking water. This will involve pipeline installation and potentially other infrastructure upgrades. Opportunity for pum

rows.name: Ichthys LNG Export Terminal Operations
rows.overview: Workers at the Inpex-operated Ichthys liquefied natural gas (LNG) export terminal have started industrial action over pay and conditions. This indicates ongoing operational activity at the facility.
rows.opportunityNote: Monitor the situation for potential operational disruptions or maintenance needs that might require temporary power, air, or dewatering solutions. Industrial action could lead to increased demand for

rows.name: Geelong LNG Import Terminal
rows.overview: Viva Energy has secured another environmental approval for its proposed FSRU-based LNG import terminal in Geelong, Victoria. This project involves importing liquefied natural gas via a Floating Storag
rows.opportunityNote: This project is in the approval stage, indicating future construction and equipment needs. Atlas Copco PT can target the project owner (Viva Energy) for direct CAPEX opportunities for power generation
